<!--
Thanks for reporting a bug.

If this is a security issue, DO NOT file it here — email security@haldir.xyz
instead. See SECURITY.md for the full disclosure policy.
-->

## What happened

A clear description of what went wrong.

## What you expected

What you thought would happen instead.

## Reproduction

Smallest code / sequence of commands that reproduces the issue:

```python
# or bash, or curl, etc.
```

## Environment

- Haldir version: (e.g., `v0.2.1`, or `main @ abc1234`)
- Deployment: `hosted` / `self-hosted (docker)` / `self-hosted (bare metal)`
- Python / Node version (if relevant):
- Framework integration (if relevant): `langchain-haldir` / `crewai-haldir` / `@haldir/ai-sdk` / N/A

## Logs / output

```
(paste stderr, traceback, or any relevant logs)
```

## Anything else

(optional) screenshots, related issues, workarounds you've tried.
